title: Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha
tagline: Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha, Kerala

overview.short: The Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church is situated in the center of Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church is situated in the center of Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India. The church is under eparchy of Kothamangalam. The current vicar of church is Fr.Paul Nedumpurath.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thodupuzha River
topPlaces.description: Thodupuzha River has its origins in the Thodupuzha Taluk in the Idukki district of Kerala, India, and is a tributary of the Muvattupuzha river. The river is one of the few in the state that does not become dry in the summer as the outflow from the Idukki hydro-electric project is drained into this river via Kanjar river.

topPlaces.name: Central Mahallu Juma Masjid
topPlaces.description: The Central Mahallu Juma Masjid (Hindi: सेंट्रल महल्लु जुमा मस्जिद, मूवाट्टुपुड़ा), also known as Central Mahallu Jama'ath, is a Shafi'i Sunni Friday mosque, located in Muvattupuzha, in the Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is located adjacent to the Kavumkara market.

topPlaces.name: Muvattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Muvattupuzha ([muʋɐːt̺ːupuɻɐ]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located 35 km (21.7 mi) east of the district headquarters in Thrikkakara and about 204 km (126.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Perumpalloor
topPlaces.description: Perumpalloor is a village 4 km southeast of Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It is a small area in the Arakuzha panchayat of Muvattupuzha taluk on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha is an eparchy of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church in Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India. The seat of the eparchy is at St.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam is a prominent Jacobite Syrian Orthodox church located atop a hill on the Muvattupuzha–Kothamangalam road, approximately three kilometers from Muvattupuzha in Kerala, India.

image.alt: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Church, Marady
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Church is a church located in Kurukkunnapuram, East Marady, Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Anikkad (Muvattupuzha)
topPlaces.description: Anikkad is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located near the Muvattupuzha town in Avoly Panchayat.

items.note: Thodupuzha River has its origins in the Thodupuzha Taluk in the Idukki district of Kerala, India, and is a tributary of the Muvattupuzha river. The river is one of the few in the state that does not become dry in the summer as the outflow from the Idukki hydro-electric project is drained into this river via Kanjar river.

The Central Mahallu Juma Masjid (Hindi: सेंट्रल महल्लु जुमा मस्जिद, मूवाट्टुपुड़ा), also known as Central Mahallu Jama'ath, is a Shafi'i Sunni Friday mosque, located in Muvattupuzha, in the Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is located adjacent to the Kavumkara market.

Muvattupuzha ([muʋɐːt̺ːupuɻɐ]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located 35 km (21.7 mi) east of the district headquarters in Thrikkakara and about 204 km (126.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.
Perumpalloor is a village 4 km southeast of Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It is a small area in the Arakuzha panchayat of Muvattupuzha taluk on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.
Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha is an eparchy of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church in Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India. The seat of the eparchy is at St.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (32 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha?
faq.a: Stays in Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Holy Magi Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Muvattupuzha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thodupuzha River, Central Mahallu Juma Masjid, Muvattupuzha, Perumpalloor, Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha.
